name: SpaGE Spatial Imputation Service
description: Impute single-cell expression onto spatial transcriptomics using SpaGE / nearest neighbors. Outputs imputed spatial expression, mapping scores, and run metrics.

top_genes.description: Number of highly variable/intersection genes to use

spatial_file.description: Preprocessed spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad); raw spatial_rna_seq_data must be preprocessed first.

single_cell_file.description: Preprocessed single-cell reference data (h5ad); raw single-cell data must go through preprocessing first.

output_config.collection_description: Outputs SpaGE/NN imputation results, mapping scores, and run metrics.

items.description: AnnData object (h5ad format) containing imputed spatial transcriptomics data. Attributes: 'X' (imputed expression matrix, spots/cells x genes, where genes are from single-cell reference), 'obs' (spot/cell metadata matching spatial input with spatial coordinates and annotations), 'var' (gene metadata with gene identifiers from the intersection of spatial and single-cell data), 'obsm' (spatial coordinates preserved from input), 'uns' (unsupervised annotations including imputation parameters, gene intersection information, and mapping statistics)

CSV file containing mapping scores and distances for spatial locations. Columns: 'spot_id' (spatial location identifier), 'nearest_cell_id' (identifier of nearest single-cell reference cell), 'distance' (distance in PCA space or expression space), 'mapping_score' (confidence score for the mapping), 'n_neighbors' (number of neighbors used in imputation)
Run statistics (parameters, gene intersections, distance summaries, etc.)
Text report containing service statistics and summary information
